text:
TRADE CASE STUDIES (good + bad for SFT):

[LOSS] CTEV Industrial | ret -14.05% | ctr -13.37% | $-327.55
  mistake: Hope-held one industrial trip — largest dollar loss. Ticker not banned.
  teach: EXIT at hard stop on THIS trip; CTEV tradeable again when next 80%+ lottery setup fires.

[LOSS] PLUG Energy | ret -10.29% | ctr -9.29% | $-220.99
  mistake: Hope-held THIS round-trip through reversal. Commander also profits PLUG/vol energy on other calculated entries.
  teach: EXIT at early_loss/spike_top on losing trip; RE-ENTER PLUG when spike≥2x and conviction≥80% (see USEG win same sector).

[LOSS] ENVB Healthcare | ret -9.12% | ctr -9.12% | $-220.71
  mistake: Hope-held biotech after momentum faded — execution error, not symbol veto.
  teach: EXIT on fade; ENVB OK to trade again on next vol spike with mechanical exit.

[LOSS] SMTK Technology | ret -22.53% | ctr -5.76% | $-19.83
  mistake: Entered THIS setup below 80% conviction — weak vol, not calculated lottery.
  teach: SKIP this weak setup only; SMTK still allowed when future scan hits 80%+ thresholds.

[WIN] USEG Energy | ret +3.98% | ctr +3.21% | $+77.00
  teach: Energy CAN win — same sector as PLUG loss; ENTER on spike, EXIT disciplined. Learn from contrast.

[WIN] NAK Basic Materials | ret +7.84% | ctr +7.19% | $+153.96
  teach: ENTER momentum spike; EXIT into strength — model round-trip.

[WIN] RXT Technology | ret +9.06% | ctr +7.18% | $+164.56
  teach: Fast tech scalp with vol — take profit at spike top.

[WIN] ELAB Basic Materials | ret +13.44% | ctr +5.72% | $+130.16
  teach: Materials momentum — enter early vol, exit before giveback.

[WIN] VSA Education | ret +12.02% | ctr +5.29% | $+120.57
  teach: Spike capture on thin name — size within risk, exit quick.

[WIN] MASK Technology | ret +5.88% | ctr +5.23% | $+117.80
  teach: Vol-led entry, mechanical exit — no human hesitation.
